name: keyBy
description: The standalone lodash.keyby package as a vendorable file. Useful when you want lodash's keying behavior without another npm dependency.
tagline: Index items by an iteratee result.
summary: This page ships the published lodash.keyby file in both raw and normalized forms. The value is to keep a known keying contract local instead of re-implementing ad hoc reducers in each repo.
nativeAlternative: A reduce-based object builder is close, but teams may still want the exact lodash keyBy behavior they already rely on.

variants.label: Normalized
variants.note: Rule-based normalization for modern TS projects. The goal is easier import and build compatibility, not changed behavior.

variants.label: Raw
variants.note: Published package file kept as-is for older teams or repos that still prefer the original CommonJS distribution.

note: Raw and normalized views are both available. Use normalized when you want an ESM and TypeScript-friendly file, and raw when you want the original published package shape.
